A Walk Among the Tombstones (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,017,685Details
International Box Office $36,090,902
Worldwide Box Office $62,108,587
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,701,486
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,158,197
Total $10,859,683
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Matt Scudder, is an ex-NYPD cop who now works as an unlicensed private investigator operating just outside the law. When Scudder reluctantly agrees to help a heroin trafficker hunt down the men who kidnapped and then brutally murdered his wife, the PI learns that this is not the first time these men have committed this sort of twisted crime...nor will it be the last. Blurring the lines between right and wrong, Scudder races to track the deviants through the backstreets of New York City before they kill again.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,758,780 (49.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,712 opening theaters/2,714 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,087,086

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 19th, 2014 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: January 13th, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, disturbing images, language and brief nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2293, 10/9/2013)
Running Time: 113 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Digital Cinematography, Prologue
Geographical setting: New York
Plot point: Accidental Death, Addiction, Corrupt Cops, DEA Agent, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Ex-cop, Homeless, Kidnap, Narcotics, Non-Chronological, Private Investigator, Rehab / Former Addict, Revenge, Sex Crimes, Snuff Film
Social setting: Film Noir, Organized Crime
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Exclusive Media Group, Cross Creek Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Spanish

Synopsis

Matt Scudder, is an ex-NYPD cop who now works as an unlicensed private investigator operating just outside the law. When Scudder reluctantly agrees to help a heroin trafficker hunt down the men who kidnapped and then brutally murdered his wife, the PI learns that this is not the first time these men have committed this sort of twisted crime...nor will it be the last. Blurring the lines between right and wrong, Scudder races to track the deviants through the backstreets of New York City before they kill again.
